Wattle Bay Energy Limited (ASX code: WBE; ABN 00 000 000 000) — internal compliance memo for AU disclosure and information handling.
Continuous disclosure status: On 12 March WBE lodged Appendix 4D and announced “Mallee Ridge Stage 1 commissioning complete”; this information is public and stale.
ASX Listing Rule 3.1 obligations continue to be met; all slides from the 20 April investor webinar are on the Market Announcements Platform, and no selective disclosure occurred.
The response to an ASX price query dated 18 April was released via MAP; ASIC lodgement references are on file.
Investor relations prepared a media summary on 22 April that simply repeats previously released content; no new information is included.
Under s674 of the Corporations Act, no material information is currently withheld other than the following item subject to LR 3.1A confidentiality, assessed on an issuer‑relative basis.
Draft Board paper notes preliminary Q4 production is tracking materially below the 1 February operational update; this assessment is not generally available and should be treated as MNPI under s1043A.
If confirmed by the monthly reconciliation, an ASX announcement under LR 3.1 will be prepared for immediate lodgement; until then, no briefings will go beyond public content.
HR onboarding template includes labels such as “Tax File Number”, “Medicare No.”, and “Emergency Contact”, with placeholder values TFN: 000 000 000 and Medicare: 0000 00000 0.
Employment forms and pre‑employment health self‑assessment are blank exemplars for process mapping only; they do not identify or reasonably identify any individual.
Credit assessment template references AUSCredit Bureau file ID ABC‑000‑000 and Driver Licence field DL‑XXX000; these entries are invalid samples.
Finance training pack shows BSB 000‑000, Account 00000000, and card suffix 0000; there are no live accounts or transactions.
Registry items: Appendix 3Y director interest notices filed on 5 May relate to historic equity vesting and are already public; the March quarter blackout closed on 30 April as scheduled on the internal calendar.
Queries should be directed to governance@wattlebay.example or the Compliance mailbox; drafts of any market communications must be cleared before ASX lodgement.
